title: High-Energy Uplift
description: Fast, energetic, and upbeat tracks with strong rhythm and positive mood.
insight: This cluster represents high-tempo, feel-good music. Despite spanning multiple genres, these songs share a consistent energetic and uplifting sound profile.

title: Groovy but Low-Valence
description: Danceable tracks with a darker or more subdued emotional tone.
insight: Although highly rhythmic, these songs lean toward lower valence, suggesting that danceability and mood are not always aligned.

title: Bright & Dance-Driven
description: Highly danceable, energetic, and positive tracks with mainstream appeal.
insight: This cluster forms a 'pop core,' where high energy and high valence combine into broadly accessible, upbeat music.

title: Acoustic & Fast
description: Acoustic-heavy songs with faster tempos but lower energy and mood.
insight: These tracks contrast speed with softness—faster rhythms paired with organic instrumentation and more restrained emotional tone.

title: Warm & Acoustic
description: Mid-energy, acoustic-driven tracks with a warm and positive feel.
insight: This cluster blends organic sound with moderate positivity, often bridging genres like folk, indie, and acoustic pop.

title: Slow & Melancholic
description: Low-energy, acoustic-heavy songs with subdued and introspective mood.
insight: This cluster captures slower, more emotional music, emphasizing mood and texture over rhythm or intensity.

title: Instrumental & Ambient
description: Low-energy, highly instrumental tracks with minimal vocals.
insight: This cluster stands out for its extremely high instrumentalness, representing ambient, cinematic, or background-focused music.

title: High-Energy, Low-Acoustic
description: Energetic tracks with electronic production and minimal acoustic elements.
insight: This cluster reflects modern, digitally produced music—high intensity but less organic in sound.

title: Fast & Intense
description: Very high-energy, fast-tempo tracks with lower danceability.
insight: Speed and intensity dominate here, often at the expense of groove, suggesting genres like punk, metal, or high-tempo electronic styles.

title: Chill & Danceable
description: Low-energy but highly danceable tracks with balanced mood.
insight: This cluster shows that music can be rhythmically engaging without being intense—often associated with relaxed or 'lo-fi' styles.
